response.overview: Mirabella and Al, a dysfunctional couple are invited by the Sorrentino crime family for dinner.  Lucia, wife of the Don turned police informant, was murdered, a truth that Angelo, the Don’s son,is aware of before the dinner begins. The dinner, for Angelo is the day he kills his father and Alberto and gets revenge for his mother. He kills Prosciutto but a timely power outtage gives Al and Mirabella the opportunity to escape. The couple get separated inside the mansion, Al fights for his life against Angelo, while Mirabella stumbles upon crucial information about Lucia’s death, and Al’s true nature.
response.title: Where love lied
